summary: Sir, this is a rough parameter-driven bracket concept for a garden bench mount: a 30 mm wide plate, 8 mm thick, with 150 mm hole spacing and a 12 mm bend radius. I have preserved the mounting geometry, added drainage, and softened the corners so the part is less inclined to crack from repeated outdoor indignities.
parameters: hole_d = 9; // adjust to suit fastener clearance
edge_margin = 20; // from plate ends to hole centers
drain_offset = 10; // from lowest flat face edge, if orientation requires
bend_angle = 90; // assumed bracket bend, adjust as needed
fit_checks: The hole centers are set 150 mm apart, with an assumed
export_detail: Exported CadQuery bracket assets as STL, STEP, and 3MF, then assembled a slicer pack for creality-k2-pro-combo using the fit-check-fast profile.
